title: ECC Ontology Index Schema
description: Schema for .claude/ontology/index.json — Claude's JIT file coordinate GPS. Each domain_* key maps a logical domain to its file paths and feature spec, allowing Claude to delegate to Codex without reading source files directly.

files.description: File paths or directory paths (trailing / = directory). Passed verbatim as FILES list in Codex BRIEF.

spec.description: Path to the feature doc under docs/features/. Claude reads only this file to understand business intent.

detail.description: Path to the rich machine-readable domain JSON under .claude/ontology/. Loaded on-demand for Codex BRIEF generation.

summary.description: One-line description of this domain. Used by ontology.js summary command to avoid reading spec files.

owner.description: Team or area that owns this domain (informational).

symbols.description: Key exported symbols or function names. Helps Codex narrow search within files.

dependsOn.description: Other domain_ keys this domain depends on.

codexWorkerHint.description: Suggested Codex agent role. read-only = explorer/reviewer, workspace-write = implementer.

riskLevel.description: Optional. 'high' triggers stronger constraint-guard.js warnings with a WARNING: HIGH RISK header when violations are detected.

constraints.description: Human-readable constraints for this domain. Each item may include machine-checkable violation patterns using the |pattern: suffix. Format: 'constraint description|pattern:keyword1|pattern:keyword2'. The text before the first |pattern: is shown to the agent; each |pattern:X keyword is checked against proposed file content by constraint-guard.js (PreToolUse hook). Example: 'No network calls in blocking hooks — 200ms limit|pattern:require("node-fetch")|pattern:require("axios")'.

executionContract.description: Execution contract distilled from the source docs for this domain.

completionContract.description: Completion and handoff requirements that should be enforced for this domain.

status.description: Decay-control status. Non-active statuses are excluded from retrieval packets.

lastSeenAt.description: ISO timestamp/date used to prioritize fresh failure patterns.

updatedAt.description: ISO timestamp/date used to prioritize fresh failure patterns.

createdAt.description: ISO timestamp/date used to prioritize fresh failure patterns.

expiresAt.description: ISO timestamp/date after which this pattern is excluded from retrieval packets.

supersededBy.description: Replacement pattern ID. Presence excludes this item from retrieval packets.

replacedBy.description: Replacement pattern ID. Presence excludes this item from retrieval packets.

failurePatterns.description: Promoted failure signatures that should influence future work in this domain.

retrievalProfiles.description: Profile-specific include lists to keep ontology retrieval minimal and context-aware.

prevention.description: Keyword/pattern to auto-inject into domain constraints[] for constraint-guard.js enforcement. When provided with type=bug-fix or type=constraint, decisions.js appends '[prevention] <summary>|pattern:<prevention>' to the domain's constraints[] so the same mistake is blocked in future sessions.

evidence.description: Concrete proof captured while resolving or validating the issue.

falseNormalSignals.description: Signals that looked healthy but turned out to be misleading.

verifyWith.description: Checks to rerun first if the problem recurs.

nextSuspicion.description: What to suspect first if the same pattern appears again.

status.description: Decay-control status. Non-active statuses are excluded from retrieval packets.

createdAt.description: ISO timestamp/date used to prioritize fresh decisions.

updatedAt.description: ISO timestamp/date used to prioritize fresh decisions.

lastSeenAt.description: ISO timestamp/date used to prioritize fresh decisions.

expiresAt.description: ISO timestamp/date after which this decision is excluded from retrieval packets.

supersededBy.description: Replacement decision ID. Presence excludes this item from retrieval packets.

replacedBy.description: Replacement decision ID. Presence excludes this item from retrieval packets.

domain.description: Domain key — populated automatically by addDecision()

decisions.description: Append-only decision log for this domain. Records design decisions, bug root causes, tool patterns, and change reasons. Query via: node scripts/lib/decisions.js query --domain <domain>
